creator: meetshamsher@gmail.com
text:
it's releng/13.0
Multiple process are running. But swap size getting fixed at certain percentage and keep on increasing till 30% may be in ~24Hr.

But why time to time swap out is not happening from kernel by itself ?
any idea or patch available for this to get swapped out time to time.

Seeing one patch : https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=4867d7d34dfd54986d5798eddc3ce92a70cc9841
Which tell about logic error "vm_page: Fix a logic error in the handling of PQ_ACTIVE operations" but it's seems to be not much useful for releng/13.0.

Note: already flag setting vm.pageout_update_period to 0.
